text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: It's... new. I like it...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a day out, we had planned on swinging by a
particular cafe on the way home, only to find it
was full. We're now at plan B.
choice_data_list: (I wonder if she's having a good time...)

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
There's the Miraculously ☆ Milky Cafe au Lait...
and the Fluffy ♪ Bunny Hop-tastic Parfait...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
What a peculiar menu... I've never seen any of
these at the cafes I frequent.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Well, let's order... It'll be a nice surprise when we
see what we get.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I follow her suggestion and just pick something to
order.
choice_data_list: I'll have the Miraculously ☆ Milky Cafe Au Lait.
I'll have the Fluffy ♪ Bunny Hop-tastic Parfait.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I was thinking of ordering that too... It sounds the
most like coffee...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We wait for our orders to arrive. And then...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
It looks like a normal cafe au lait. Okay, I'm going
to take a sip.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: It's s-so sweet!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...Did they put condensed milk in this? It's a lot
sweeter than I was expecting...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I think so... I just have to reach the bottom, where
all the coffee is...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe is struggling to drink it. Maybe
she doesn't like sweet coffee? I go grab her a
glass of water.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Hey, are you doing okay?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Oh, Dober... I didn't realize you were here.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I wasn't sitting too far away so I overheard you...
That drink's on the sweet side, right?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Yes, very much so... It's much sweeter than
anything I usually drink.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Well, if you don't mind...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...Would you like to switch with me? My drink has
latte art on top, but it's straight black coffee
underneath.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Are you sure? But wait, I don't remember seeing
that drink anywhere on the menu...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
It's in the corner, look. It's called Smiley Panda's
Artsy Latte.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Smiley... Panda?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but I just bought this drink on a whim! You
know, just to try it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
And it's pure coincidence that I'm here right now!
I'm not a regular or anything!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I see... I thought you might come here often,
since your charming airs are such a fine fit for this
cafe.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Charming?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...Never knew you were so good at dishing out
compliments.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I wouldn't say that... I just said what I was
thinking.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I return to my seat to find Manhattan Cafe and
Mejiro Dober in cheerful conversation. It warms
my heart to see such close friends chatting away.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that does sound cute... I'll have that one as
well...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We wait for our orders to arrive. And then...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
This is amazing... They shaped the fluffy cream to
look just like a rabbit...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: How cute...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I never would have expected us to end up in this
cafe, but Manhattan Cafe does seem to be having
fun. No longer concerned, I start to relax when...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Hold on now! Is that the Fluffy ♪ Bunny
Hop-tastic Parfait you've got there?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Yukino... Have you come to eat one of these
too?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Sure have. I heard they were trend'n with the city
girls, so I fancied try'n one myself.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
...I had plans to meet a friend, but she cancel'd on
account of some extra homework. So I was think'n
maybe I should come anoth'r time.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Oh... Well, why don't we share mine?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Huh... Are you sure?!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Of course... You're a fellow bunny lover, so let's
make the most of this together...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Well, thank you kindly! Hehe, you're so nice,
Cafe. ♪

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: The little bunny's so cute, isn't it? ♪

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Yes, it's... hop-tastic...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: And the cream's so fluffy too! ♪

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Yes, as fluffy as a cloud...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maybe it's because of their special bond as
roommates, but the two of them look like they're
having a wonderful time.
